strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, CI/CD, open-source founder, conference talks, and workshop instruction
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, research, or platform-building track record
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level or Principal with strategic advisory scope
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or shaping cloud product future-state at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and recognized AI products
Director-level / Principal IC seniority and strategic influence
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, cloud platform strategy fluency, and experience advising strategic customers — competencies the résumé does not substantiate. AI exposure is limited to a recent mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators' at re:cinq with no shipped AI products, publications, or platform leadership cited. Seniority tops out at Staff/Senior Software Engineer with hands-on delivery rather than org-wide technical strategy, and there is no evidence of customer/partner advisory work or shaping cloud product direction. Strengths in polyglot full-stack delivery, open-source founding (GISCollective), and craftsmanship (TDD, talks, workshops) are real but address secondary competencies. Net fit for a Principal AI Strategy role is low.
